response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) at re:cinq, but the role requires a director-level IC with deep, recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy chops, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers on cutting-edge cloud/AI adoption. The resume shows craftsmanship-level IC work at small-to-mid companies rather than principal-scale technical leadership, no demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale, and no cloud strategy experience. Tenure is borderline on the 15-year bar and lacks the influence/thought-leadership signal expected here.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded
Recent hands-on with MCP and agentic AI tooling at re:cinq
Track record of community contribution: talks, workshops, open-source GIS platform
concerns: No principal/director-level IC scope or platform-strategy leadership demonstrated
AI exposure is recent and tactical, not a recognized body of AI products or research
No cloud platform expertise (AWS/GCP/Azure strategy) or advanced AI degree

key_factors.factor: Limited depth of AI strategy and recognized AI work
